creator: ady@ady.ro
text:
Hi,

    If you're still pursuing this issue please note that the
imap-4.7.lock-patch.tar has been incorporated together with some token
parsing bugfixes into the new imap-4.7a.tar.Z source tarball...
    For a quick fixup lookup PR #16665 for a suggested patch by the time
we get the port updated.

    For the CVS meisters: please close this PR, we'll upgrade the port
soon.

 Thanks!
 Ady (@ady.ro)
